# PENGER — Aerospace-Grade Titanium Seed Phrase Storage

> PENGER is a premium physical backup solution for cryptocurrency self-custody. It provides an indestructible aerospace-grade titanium plate and puncher kit for encoding BIP39 seed phrases as binary dot patterns. Designed for digital capital owners who think in decades, PENGER offers free online simulators, a BIP39 dictionary, an AI tutor, and a comprehensive self-custodial academy alongside its titanium storage product.

## Tools

- [Interactive Simulators](https://mypenger.com/simulators.html): Free offline BIP39 seed phrase generator with binary encoder and decoder. Generate cryptographically random seed phrases, visualize 12-bit binary dot matrix patterns, and practice encoding/decoding before punching a titanium plate.
- [BIP39 Dictionary](https://mypenger.com/dictionary.html): Browse all 2048 BIP39 words with their binary index and punch pattern. Search, filter by letter, and download a PDF version for offline reference.
- [AI Tutor](https://mypenger.com/ai-tutor.html): Interactive guided chat for learning crypto self-custody step by step. Pick a topic and follow scenario-based conversations about wallets, seed phrases, and security at your own pace.

## Academy

- [Anatomy of a Seed Phrase](https://mypenger.com/guide-seed-anatomy.html): Learn how BIP39 seed phrases work — from entropy generation and CSPRNG to word selection, SHA-256 checksum verification, and master key derivation via PBKDF2 and BIP32.
- [Anatomy of a Wallet](https://mypenger.com/guide-wallet-anatomy.html): Understand how crypto wallets work under the hood — key derivation, public/private key pairs, HD wallet address generation, ECDSA/Schnorr signing, and UTXO vs account models.
- [Self-Sovereignty](https://mypenger.com/guide-self-sovereignty.html): The philosophy and practice of being your own bank — why self-custody matters, risks of custodial services like exchange collapses, and a practical three-stage roadmap to financial autonomy.
- [Wallet Types Comparison](https://mypenger.com/guide-wallet-comparison.html): Compare hot wallets, cold storage, hardware devices, and multi-sig setups. Covers custodial vs self-custodial trade-offs, air-gapped signing, MPC wallets, and secure element evaluation.
- [Operational Security (OpSec)](https://mypenger.com/guide-opsec.html): Practical crypto OpSec covering threat modeling, digital security habits, physical backup hygiene, social engineering defense, key ceremony protocols, and inheritance planning.
- [The 25th Word (Passphrase)](https://mypenger.com/guide-passphrase.html): How an optional BIP39 passphrase adds an extra security layer on top of your seed phrase, enables hidden wallets with plausible deniability, and the risks of passphrase loss.
- [Multisignature (Multisig)](https://mypenger.com/guide-multisig.html): Multi-key setups that eliminate single points of failure — quorum policies (2-of-3, 3-of-5), Bitcoin Script enforcement, Taproot MuSig2 privacy, vendor diversity, and collaborative custody.

## About

- [Contacts](https://mypenger.com/contacts.html): Contact PENGER via email (contact@mypenger.com) or Telegram (@pengercom) for orders, support, and partnerships. Led by CEO Hlib Suslov.
